settings.title: Problem 1 — Pesticides in the food supply
settings.body: India is among the world's largest users of pesticides. Most food products — including those labelled organic — carry no verifiable proof of pesticide testing. We test every batch for 250+ residues and publish the results.

settings.title: Problem 2 — Ultra-processed products
settings.body: Industrial processing strips nutrition to extend shelf life and reduce cost. Traditional methods — bilona, cold pressing, stone grinding — preserve what food was meant to contain. We have never compromised on this.

settings.title: Our answer — Clean, traceable, traditional
settings.body: Certified organic with transaction certificates. Lab tested with published reports. Traditionally processed with no additives. That is the Earthen Story standard — for every product, every batch.

settings.title: Transaction Certificates for Every Batch
settings.desc: We source exclusively from NPOP and India Organic certified farms. Every batch comes with a transaction certificate tracing origin — not just a general organic label. Available on request for each order.

settings.title: NABL-Accredited Lab Testing — Published Publicly
settings.desc: Every product is independently tested for 250+ pesticide residues by third-party NABL-accredited labs. We publish all reports without selection — good and bad batches alike.

settings.title: FSSAI Certified & Export Documentation
settings.desc: FSSAI certified facility. For export buyers, we support full documentation including NPOP organic certificates, phytosanitary certificates, and lab reports in the formats required by importing countries.

settings.title: Traditional Processing — No Industrial Shortcuts
settings.desc: Bilona churning for ghee, cold pressing for oils, stone grinding for flours. No additives, no preservatives, no industrial shortcuts. What is in the product is exactly what the label says.

settings.hero_subtitle: Consistent supply of genuinely organic, lab-tested products — backed by transaction certificates, NABL lab reports, and FSSAI certification. For distributors, HoReCa, and export buyers who need traceability they can rely on.
settings.mission_body_1: We started Earthen Story because we saw two problems that nobody was solving honestly. Indian agriculture uses some of the highest concentrations of pesticides in the world — yet most "organic" products on shelves offer no verifiable proof. And the traditional processing methods that preserved nutrition for generations — bilona churning, cold pressing, stone grinding — have been replaced by industrial shortcuts that cut cost but strip quality.
settings.mission_body_2: Earthen Story was built to fix both. We source directly from certified organic farms with transaction certificates for every batch. We process the traditional way. And we test everything — independently, by NABL-accredited labs — and publish every report publicly. No selective disclosure.
settings.supply_subtitle: Browse any category to see individual products, certifications, and specifications.
settings.form_desc: Fill in the form and we will get back to you within 2 business days. We will share product specifications, certifications, pricing, and discuss supply terms directly.
settings.form_response_note: We typically respond within 1-2 business days.
settings.form_privacy_note: We will respond within 2 business days. Your information is never shared.
